title: Shulker UI
description: Makes the Shulker Box UI look nicer
body:
## Makes the Shulker Box UI look nicer
[![View the pack on my website!](https://img.shields.io/badge/View%20the%20pack%20on%20my%20website!-black?style=for-the-badge)](https://mr-expence.github.io/projects/shulker-ui)

Changes the default shulker box GUI to a colouruful design that fits the shulker box's colour Requires OptiGUI to work
